understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to move selectable pieces onto goal tiles (marked '+') in each level to win, using a limited number of steps per level.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement occurs in discrete pixel steps (3 pixels per cell) and can be blocked by walls or other objects. The selected piece can be changed using CLICK at a target position, but only if that position corresponds to another selectable piece and is reachable. Pushing pushable objects may occur if they are adjacent in the movement direction. Movement_blocked hints indicate adjacent objects but do not guarantee action failure. The level fails when steps run out if goals are not all occupied.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to move selectable pieces onto goal tiles (marked '+') in each level to win, using a limited number of steps per level.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement occurs in discrete pixel steps (3 pixels per cell) and can be blocked by walls or other objects. The selected piece can be changed using CLICK at a target position, but only if that position corresponds to another selectable piece and is reachable. Pushing pushable objects may occur if they are adjacent in the movement direction. Movement_blocked hints indicate adjacent objects but do not guarantee action failure. The level fails when steps run out if goals are not all occupied.
